rating.label: At your service across the region

content.titre: One provider for every kind of place
content.intro: From recurring cleaning of common areas to a full clean-up after building work, we cover the needs of property managers, businesses and households across the Paris region.

items.description: Lobbies, staircases, landings, lifts and interior windows kept up on a regular schedule, with a single point of contact for your managing agent.
Offices, restaurants and professional kitchens cleaned before opening or after closing, without disrupting your business.
Shopfronts, bay windows and panes made crystal clear on both sides, for shops and households alike.
Regular or one-off upkeep of your home, always entrusted to the same person, mindful of your habits.
Fabrics revived by hot-water extraction: seats sanitised, stains treated, rugs washed fibre by fibre.
After building work or a move, the place is taken back room by room, right through to handing over the keys.
Professional cleaning and disinfection: hospital-grade hygiene protocols and bio-cleaning, with suitable methods and products.

content.intro: A glimpse of our visits, from building common areas to office windows and sofas brought back to life.

image.alt: RD NET&PROPRE team vacuuming and mopping the floor of a bright living room
Clean, tidy office space after an RD NET&PROPRE visit
Deep vacuum cleaning of a sofa cushion
Technicians cleaning the windows of a building facade at height

paragraphes: RD NET&PROPRE grew out of a wish to give property managers, businesses and families across Île-de-France cleaning that truly holds up over time, far from rushed jobs. Based in Paris, we cover the whole region for both routine upkeep and one-off clean-ups.

Our stance is simple: regular cleaners rather than an anonymous rotation, a contact who knows your premises, and a systematic check before we leave. That is what keeps a lobby tidy week after week and lets an office welcome your teams in the best conditions.
We welcome our clients in French, English, Spanish and Arabic: everyone can describe their need in their own language and receive a clear, jargon-free quote.

image.alt: RD NET&PROPRE visual — professional cleaning equipment in a bright office

content.titre: From your call to a spotless place

items.texte: By phone, WhatsApp or the form, you tell us the type of space, the surface area and the frequency you want.
We send back a detailed proposal, with a firm price and the cleaning schedule that fits.
The team works with its own equipment and checks every zone before leaving. The result shows from the very first visit.

content.titre: Paris as our anchor, Île-de-France as our ground
content.intro: We work within central Paris and across the region's eight departments, from the inner to the outer suburbs. A trip to the edge of the region doesn't scare us: just tell us where the place is.

items.question: Do you work mainly with businesses or with households?
items.reponse: Both. We maintain the common areas of apartment blocks and the premises of businesses, and we also look after private homes. Each service has its own page with the detail of what is included.

items.question: How quickly can we start?
items.reponse: For a one-off visit, we can often offer a slot within the week. For a recurring contract, we agree on a fixed schedule together. The quote itself reaches you within 24 hours.

items.question: Do we need to provide equipment and products?
items.reponse: No, we come fully equipped. If you would rather we use specific products, for a delicate surface or with children around, just say so when we quote.

items.question: Which languages can we reach you in?
items.reponse: French, English, Spanish and Arabic. Describe your need in whichever language suits you, and the reply will follow in the same one.

content.titre: A place to bring back to spotless?
content.sousTitre: Phone, WhatsApp or the online form: your free estimate reaches you within 24 hours.

content.titre: Every place has its own cleaning
content.intro: We match method, frequency and products to the nature of the space: a building lobby isn't kept like an office, nor a sofa like a shopfront. Here are our six areas of work.
Scheduled visits, a single point of contact and clear reports for those who manage buildings and business premises.

items.description: Lobbies, stairwells, landings, lifts and interior windows: regular upkeep that adds value to the building and reassures residents.
Offices, restaurants and professional kitchens, cleaned outside your opening hours, in line with hygiene rules.
Shop windows, glass facades and office panes cleaned streak-free, with heights handled safely.
Professional cleaning and disinfection: hospital-grade hygiene protocols and bio-cleaning, with suitable methods and products.

content.titre: For your home and your fabrics
content.intro: The same eye for detail, brought home: ongoing upkeep and furniture that gets its freshness back.

items.description: Weekly or one-off upkeep: floors, kitchen, bathroom and dusting followed to your instructions, by a dedicated cleaner.
Deep hot-water extraction: fabrics come out sanitised, deodorised and dry within a few hours. Rugs washed to suit the fibre.
After building work or before a move-out inspection: site dust, paint marks and floors taken back to the last corner.

content.titre: Not sure which box your need fits into?
content.sousTitre: Describe the place and the goal: we point you to the right service and price the whole thing.

meta.title: Apartment block & common-area cleaning Paris
meta.description: Common-area upkeep across Île-de-France: lobbies, staircases, landings, lifts and interior windows. Regular schedule, single contact, free quote.

service.name: Apartment block & common-area cleaning
service.description: Regular upkeep of the common areas of residential buildings across Île-de-France.

content.titre: Common areas that always look their best
content.intro: A well-kept building shows from the lobby. We maintain your common areas on a regular rhythm, for satisfied residents and a well-preserved property.

content.titre: Upkeep built for managing agents and residents
paragraphes: Maintaining common areas is at the heart of what we do for apartment blocks across the Paris region. We handle the sweeping and washing of lobbies, stairwells and landings, the dusting of handrails, letterboxes and switches, the cleaning of lift cabins and interior windows; managing the bins on collection days can be added under the contract.

Each building gets a fixed schedule and, ideally, the same cleaners from one week to the next: they know the corners, the building's habits and flag to the managing agent whatever needs attention. You keep a single contact, reachable, and a clear report of what is done.

The frequency follows the life of the building: weekly, fortnightly or several times a week for high-traffic blocks. We draw up the quote once we've seen the place, for a fair price with no surprises.

items.question: Do you offer regular upkeep contracts?
items.reponse: Yes, it's the most common format for apartment blocks: a fixed schedule, a frequency agreed with the managing agent or residents' council, and readable monthly billing. One-off visits remain possible for an isolated need.

items.question: Do you handle the bins and the bin-store cleaning?
items.reponse: It's a common option in our contracts. Taking bins out and back on collection days, washing the store and occasional disinfection can be included: we set it out clearly on the quote.

items.question: How does the managing agent track quality?
items.reponse: You have a single contact with us and a report of the visits. Any resident's remark reaches us directly and we adjust from the very next visit.

items.description: Glazed lobbies, doors and windows of the common areas made clear.
Common areas taken back after building work or water damage.
The caretaker's room, a shared hall or the management office.

content.titre: Entrust your common areas to a regular team
content.sousTitre: Send us the address and the number of floors: we come and see, then price the contract.

meta.title: Office & business premises cleaning in Paris
meta.description: Cleaning of offices, restaurants and professional kitchens across Île-de-France, from €120. Visits outside opening hours, careful hygiene, quote within 24h.

service.name: Office & business premises cleaning
service.description: Upkeep of offices, restaurants and professional kitchens across Île-de-France.

content.titre: Clean premises, without disrupting your work
content.intro: A healthy work environment sets the tone for your teams and your clients. We maintain your offices and business spaces before opening or after closing.

paragraphes: We work in workspaces of every size: office floors, practices, meeting rooms, washrooms and reception areas. The protocol covers emptying bins, dusting desks, washing floors, disinfecting contact points and keeping the washrooms up, with restocking of consumables if you wish.

For restaurants, the bar rises: degreasing surfaces, cleaning dining rooms and professional kitchens in line with hygiene rules, non-slip floors treated with the right products. We fit our visits to your service, early morning or late evening, so we never get in the way of welcoming the public.
The service starts at €120 and adjusts to the surface area, the frequency and the level of demand. A recurring contract guarantees the same pair of cleaners and a steady result, week after week.

We also carry out professional cleaning and disinfection of sensitive environments: hospital-grade hygiene protocols and bio-cleaning, with methods and products suited to each surface. A fit for practices, laboratories, treatment rooms and any premises where sanitary standards are at their highest.

items.question: Can you work outside opening hours?
items.reponse: Yes, it's even the rule for most of our business clients. Early morning, in the evening or overnight depending on your activity: we set the visits around your quiet slots so we never disturb clients and staff.

items.question: Do you respect hygiene constraints in a professional kitchen?
items.reponse: We use products and methods suited to food surfaces and degreasing, and we work within the logic of restaurant hygiene rules. The detail of the zones treated appears on the quote.

items.question: Is office cleaning billed by the hour or as a package?
items.reponse: Most often as a package, based on surface area and frequency, for a predictable budget. For a one-off need or a large surface, we can also price it per visit.

items.description: Office windows and panes streak-free, street side and courtyard side.
Premises taken back thoroughly after a fit-out or before handover.
Reception seating and meeting-room chairs sanitised.

content.titre: A quote for your offices or your shop?
content.sousTitre: Tell us the surface area and your hours: we propose a schedule and a firm price.

meta.title: Window cleaning in Paris, from €100
meta.description: Window cleaning for businesses and households across Île-de-France, from €100. Shopfronts, bay windows and panes streak-free, both sides. Free quote within 24h.

service.name: Window cleaning
service.description: Cleaning of windows, shopfronts and bay windows for businesses and households across Île-de-France.

content.titre: The light comes in, the streaks go out
content.intro: Clean windows change everything: a shopfront that invites you in, a brighter office, a transformed living room. We wash your glazed surfaces on both sides.

paragraphes: We clean the windows of shops and businesses just as we do those of homes: shopfronts and storefronts, glass roofs, sliding bays, small-pane windows, frames and sills. Each surface is washed on both faces, then checked against the light to leave no film or run.

For shop windows, a regular visit keeps a polished image that matters at the moment a customer hesitates to push the door. For households, a seasonal deep clean is often enough to bring clarity back to the whole home. High surfaces are handled with the right equipment, safely.
The service starts at €100 and depends on the number of openings, how reachable they are and the frequency. We price precisely after surveying the surfaces to be treated.

items.question: Do you clean shop windows on a regular basis?
items.reponse: Yes. Many shopkeepers choose a weekly or fortnightly visit to keep a spotless front at all times. We come in before opening so as not to get in the customers' way.

items.question: Can you reach windows up high?
items.reponse: We handle surfaces at a reasonable height with poles and the right equipment. For complex setups or large facades, we assess the access during the quote and propose the safest solution.

items.question: Are frames and sills included?
items.reponse: Yes, the cleaning covers the frames, sills and marks on the surrounds: that's what sets a real window clean apart from a quick wipe of the glass.

items.description: The full upkeep of the premises, windows included.
Windows built into the regular upkeep of the home.
Glazed lobbies and doors of residential buildings.

content.sousTitre: Count your windows and shopfronts, send us the number: the quote follows within 24h.

meta.title: Home cleaning in Paris, from €35/h
meta.description: Home cleaning across Île-de-France from €35/h: regular or one-off upkeep, dedicated cleaner, instructions respected, equipment provided. Free quote within 24h.

service.name: Home cleaning
service.description: Regular or one-off upkeep of the home across Île-de-France, from €35/h.

content.titre: A well-kept home, with a clear mind
content.intro: Coming back to a tidy home without spending your weekend on it: that's what we bring you, with a dedicated cleaner who knows your habits.

content.titre: The upkeep of your home, at your own pace
paragraphes: Whether you're after a weekly visit, a one-off freshen-up or a seasonal deep clean, we tailor the service to your household. Floors, kitchen, bathroom, dusting, interior windows and light tidying: you set the priorities at the first appointment, we note them and follow them at every visit.

We favour the same person from one time to the next. That's what builds trust when you hand over your keys: your cleaner ends up knowing the home, its delicate surfaces and your product preferences. With children or pets around, we naturally adjust the products used.
Home cleaning starts at €35/h, equipment and products provided. You stay free to set the frequency and can change the pace with the seasons. The quote is free and with no commitment.

items.question: Will I always have the same person?
items.reponse: It's our priority: we assign a dedicated cleaner to your home so they know your place and your instructions. If they're away, whoever stands in receives all your notes beforehand.

items.question: Can I book a one-off clean rather than a regular contract?
items.reponse: Of course. Spring deep clean, a freshen-up before a gathering or after a busy stretch: we come out one-off, with no obligation to make it recurring.

items.question: Do you offer the tax credit on home cleaning?
items.reponse: Home cleaning for a private individual is a personal service, but the tax benefit requires a specific registration. We tell you frankly, at quote time, whether your service qualifies or not.

items.description: Bring back to life the fabrics that everyday upkeep can't revive.
A deep clean of the windows to bring the light back.
A home taken back thoroughly after work or before a move.

content.titre: Fancy a break from the cleaning?
content.sousTitre: Tell us the size of the home and the pace you want: we estimate the budget within 24h.

meta.title: Sofa & rug cleaning in Paris, from €70
meta.description: Cleaning of sofas, armchairs and rugs across Île-de-France from €70. Deep hot-water extraction, stains treated, fabrics sanitised and quick to dry. Quote within 24h.

service.name: Sofa, armchair & rug cleaning
service.description: Deep cleaning of upholstery by hot-water extraction, across Île-de-France.

content.titre: Your fabrics get their freshness back
content.intro: A dull sofa, a marked rug, a smell that lingers: hot-water extraction goes after the dirt deep in the fibre, where the vacuum stops.

paragraphes: The method sprays a cleaning solution deep into the fabric, then draws it straight back out along with the dissolved dirt. The result: stains are treated, dust mites and smells are removed, and the fabric comes out sanitised rather than merely rubbed on the surface. Drying usually takes a few hours, depending on thickness and how airy the room is.

We work on fabric sofas, armchairs, padded chairs, mattresses and rugs. Each material is identified before any move: wool, cotton, synthetic or delicate fibres don't call for the same dose or the same temperature. Stubborn stains are pre-treated by hand.
Cleaning an armchair or a rug starts at €70, with large pieces and corner sofas priced by size. We come to you with all the equipment: there's nothing to move.

items.question: How long does the sofa take to dry?
items.reponse: Usually two to four hours, depending on the thickness of the padding and how airy the room is. We set the extraction to pull out as much moisture as possible and shorten the drying.

items.question: Do all stains come out?
items.reponse: The vast majority fade clearly, especially if the stain is recent. Some old or permanent marks may stay visible: we're honest about the expected result before we start.

items.question: Do you also treat mattresses and delicate rugs?
items.reponse: Yes. Mattresses, wool or silk rugs and delicate fibres are cleaned with a dose and method suited to the material, after a discreet test on a hidden spot.

items.description: The full upkeep of the home, on top of the fabrics.
Clean windows to go with the deep clean.
Reception seats and meeting-room armchairs sanitised.

content.titre: A sofa or a rug to revive?
content.sousTitre: Send us a photo on WhatsApp: the estimate will only be more accurate.

meta.title: Post-renovation clean-up in Paris, from €300
meta.description: Post-work or post-move clean-up across Île-de-France, from €300. Site dust, paint marks and floors taken back room by room. Free quote within 24h.

service.name: Post-work or post-move clean-up
service.description: Full cleaning of a home or premises after building work or before a move-out inspection, across Île-de-France.

content.eyebrow: After building work · After a move
content.titre: From the building site to the keys, ready to live in
content.intro: The end of the work always leaves a layer of fine dust, paint marks and stickers everywhere. We take the place back thoroughly so it's ready to be lived in or handed over.

content.titre: After building work or before a move-out inspection
paragraphes: A post-work clean-up is a service of its own: it can't be improvised with a plain clean. We remove the site dust that gets in everywhere, plaster and glue residue, paint and tape marks on windows and floors, stickers on new joinery, then we wash every surface down to the skirting boards and switches.

This service also suits moves: a home left spotless before the move-out inspection, or a new place cleaned before you set down your boxes. For businesses, we take a premises back after a fit-out or before handover. Each room is checked with you at the end of the visit.
The clean-up starts at €300 and depends on the surface area, the scale of the work and the starting state. A visit on site, or a few photos, is enough to draw up a precise quote.

items.question: What's the difference with a standard clean?
items.reponse: A post-work clean-up tackles soiling that everyday upkeep doesn't: fine, embedded site dust, paint spatter, glue, limescale on new sanitary ware. It calls for specific products and far more time per square metre.

items.question: Do you work before a move-out inspection?
items.reponse: Yes, it's a frequent request. We hand the home back in a careful state so you can approach the inspection calmly. Let us know the deadline so we can schedule the visit in time.

items.question: How do we get a fair price for this kind of job?
items.reponse: The best is a quick visit on site, or a few representative photos of the rooms. We match the quote to the real state rather than a blind package, to avoid any nasty surprise.

items.description: Paint and tape marks removed from glazed surfaces.
Regular upkeep once the home has been brought back to new.
Common areas taken back after work in the building.

content.sousTitre: Send us the surface area and a few photos: the quote goes out within 24 hours.

Whether your place is in a Paris arrondissement, in the inner suburbs or at the edge of the region, we apply the same method and the same check. Your town isn't listed? Just ask: if it's in Île-de-France, we come.

content.titre: Is your place somewhere on this map?

meta.title: Our approach to cleaning in Île-de-France
meta.description: RD NET&PROPRE, a cleaning company based in Paris: regular cleaners, systematic checks and a multilingual welcome at the service of the Paris region.

content.intro: A Paris-region company that puts regularity, discretion and control of the result at the centre of every visit — for property managers, businesses and households.

paragraphes: RD NET&PROPRE is a cleaning company based in Paris, serving the whole of Île-de-France. We built our approach around one conviction: cleanliness isn't judged the moment you leave, but over time. A lobby that stays tidy between two visits, an office that welcomes teams without reproach, a home where you feel good: that's the real result.

To get there, we rely on regular, trained and discreet cleaners rather than an anonymous rotation. Each client has a contact who knows their premises and expectations. And because we often work in people's homes or in sensitive spaces, trust and respect for the place come first.
We welcome our clients in French, English, Spanish and Arabic: in Paris as in the suburbs, everyone should be able to explain their need without a barrier and get a clear answer.

items.texte: Serious, discreet cleaners, respectful of your premises, your belongings and your privacy.
The same pair from one time to the next, a schedule kept and a result steady over time.
Every zone is checked before we leave: nothing is left to chance.
A welcome in four languages and a contact who really answers, in your language.

content.titre: Want to entrust us with a place?
content.sousTitre: Let's talk about your need: the conversation is no commitment and the quote is free.
